prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: STATIC-CORROSION-ZIPBAG-PARENT Product Type: STORAGE_BAG Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: Static Corrosion Protection Zip Bag Rifle and Pistol Sizes Good for 20 Years Description: Static Intercept Technology Sleeve by ASR Tactical is the ultimate for long term storage of guns, knives, electronics and/or metallic items.

This cutting edge sleeve is made of a unique material that is permanently static dissipative and protects ferrous and non-ferrous metals from corrosion. Items will remain rust-free in this bag for up to 20 years.

A perfect storage solution for guns, ammo, knives, electronics, and more.

Your chose in size and color. Search Terms: gun zip back rifle zip bag pistol zip bag set gun bag set pistol cleaner pistol barrel cleaner firearm repair tool kit firearm repair firearm repair tools gun clean kit gun clean picks clean brush for gun Features: - Dissipates static permanently - Corrosion protection - Store items in this bag for up to 20 years without having to worry about rust or corrosion - Colors: Black or Copper - Sizes: === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical Static Corrosion Protection Zip Bag

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical Static Intercept Zip Bag

anthropic.title_differentiation: Permanent Static Dissipative, Rust-Free Storage 20 Years, Rifle And Pistol Sizes, Black Or Copper

openai.title_differentiation: Permanently Static Dissipative, Corrosion Protection, Rust Free Up To 20 Years, For Guns, Ammo, Electronics
